name: Classic Leather Jacket
description: A timeless black leather jacket with a zip front, two side pockets, and a quilted lining. Slim fit, suitable for casual or semi-formal wear. Made from full-grain cowhide leather.

name: Arctic Winter Parka
description: A heavyweight hooded parka rated for temperatures down to -20°F. Features a removable faux-fur trim hood, zip-out inner fleece liner, and four exterior pockets. Water-resistant shell.

name: Ribbed Crop Top
description: A fitted ribbed-knit crop top with a scoop neck. Hits above the waist. Soft cotton-spandex blend, available in white. Great for layering or warm-weather wear.

name: Flannel Pajama Pants
description: Super-soft red flannel pajama pants with an elastic drawstring waist and two side pockets. Relaxed fit for sleeping or lounging. 100% cotton flannel.

name: Cushioned Ankle Socks (3-Pack)
description: A 3-pack of black cushioned ankle socks with arch support and moisture-wicking fabric. Reinforced heel and toe. Fits most adult shoe sizes 6–12.
